hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+push'; then make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" check-progress; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then echo 'GATE: Verify PROGRESS.md and task Status are updated before committing.' >&2; fi; exit 0
